label: workflow_run executes a seeded workflow with explicit parameters
query: Run the saved workflow with id eval-write-greeting using the workflow_run tool, passing arguments {"name": "Osaurus"}. When it finishes, reply with one line confirming what it did.
notes: Proves the deterministic execution contract under a real model: parameter validation, {{params.*}} template substitution, and tool-step dispatch through the registry. The query names the id and arguments explicitly so the only behaviour under test is calling workflow_run correctly.

seedWorkflows.name: write_greeting
seedWorkflows.description: Writes a personalized greeting to greeting.txt in the working folder.
seedWorkflows.triggerText: write a greeting file for someone
